column8: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some gray silty SAND and some rubbish and charred fragments. (FILL)
Sub-rounded gravel and cobbles of moderately decomposed granite and some brown, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Strong to moderately strong, moderately to slightly weathered and white, moderately to slightly decomposed coarse to medium grained GRANITE with widely to closely spaced, extremely narrow, medium to coarse grained and stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees & 65 degrees-75 degrees.
